concept: Consider a turn-based strategy where you direct a cleanup crew restoring ecological balance to biomes devastated by experimental weather-control technology. Deploy specialized team members—each with unique remediation abilities—to counteract specific environmental anomalies before they spread to adjacent regions. Research adaptive equipment using recovered tech fragments to enhance your team's effectiveness against increasingly complex ecological distortions. Uncover the conspiracy behind the climate manipulation experiments while racing against corporate saboteurs who want to exploit the chaotic weather phenomena for profit.
